_instructions: Translate each text into: sr (Serbian Latin with čćžšđ), sr_cyrl (Serbian Cyrillic), en (English), ru (Russian), de (German), tr (Turkish). Return same structure with translations filled in.

reviews.text: Naša prva poseta zubaru je ispala avantura za dete i divna uspomena zahvaljujući dr Milici i sestri Goci. Hvala vam.

Мне понравилась доктор! Я просто экстренно пришла с выпавшей коронкой без записи, и доктор приняла меня между пациентами, быстро поставила коронку на место и записала на прием. Потом на приёме уже установила коронку как положено, постоянно.
Я еще к ней на чистку ходила потом, и чистка меня тоже устроила. И детей к ней водила двоих, и мужу порекомендовала и он у нее же ставил новую коронку.
Рекомендую от души!
Excellent clinic!  The doctor and staff are very nice.  Helped me in an emergency.  There is also the possibility of installing an implant.  The doctor speaks English and German.

I am very grateful for the help from this lady dentist. I have dealt with many dental clinics in my life, but I have never seen such an approach to the patient. From the first word of this lady and the first intervention in your mouth, you can see how much experience she has!! I recommend it and if you want to treat your teeth, it's only there!

Za komentar gospodje Алина Шумарина ja sam bio pacijent koji je bio tu, i vi ste bili jako ne kulturni i bezobrazni dok vam je Doktorica Milica 10 minuta objasnjavala da jednostavno nema vremena i objasnjavala vam gdje se nalazi Dr.Kuhar koji je u neposrednoj blizini, dok ste se pravili ludi ne biste li usli preko reda
Ps: kao obicni pacijent nemam razloga da lazem a vi povedite malo racuna o svom ponasanju i shvatite da niste nikome od boga dati.

It was AWFUL !!!
I came late evening before 4 days off with my child that had a broken tooth. The doctor didn't have a look, just told me that she is busy and can not help. I was pleading her to show me on the Google map where should I run to, but she just called the next patient and didn't pay attention to me!
Than I bagged her at least to give me a name and she quickly wrote a name (that I didn't find on the map) and locked the door I front of my face!
I DON'T recommend to go to this clinic - thise are not doctors, they are just moneymakers.
PS: lower Mr. Emran Elezovic is just a liar. The doctor didn't explained me anything. She ignored me. Finally I cryed: help me at least to find smb else, what a doctor you are! And she gave me that paper with a name that is not on the Google map.
Don't lie, Mr. Emran. It's a sin.
I've been travelling excessively and living abroad for the past ten years. This was my best dental care experience. I would highly reccommend Dr. Georg Kukoljac and his team.

replies.text: U 32 godine rada, nikada pacijent sa bolovima nije odbijen, naravno da mora ocekivati da saceka ostale zakazane pacijente.
